zh.title: AI Agent 直连 Google 办公套件
zh.subtitle: 内置 MCP Server，开发者可立即用 Claude/Gemini 操作 Gmail、Drive、Calendar
zh.tldr: Google 开源 gws CLI 工具，内置 MCP Server，让 AI Agent 通过标准协议直接读写 Gmail、Drive、Calendar 等全套 Workspace API，已获 1.5 万 GitHub Stars。

values: Model Armor + AES-256 凭证加密
rows.note: Model Armor 可扫描 API 响应中的 prompt injection，需配合 Google Cloud 使用

keyMetrics.footnote: gws 基于 Google Discovery Service 动态生成命令，新 API 端点无需更新即可使用
keyMetrics.subject: gws CLI

zh.whatHappened:
Google 于 2026 年 3 月 2 日在 GitHub 发布了开源项目 [googleworkspace/cli](https://github.com/googleworkspace/cli)（简称 gws），这是一个用 Rust 编写的命令行工具，通过单一入口提供对 Drive、Gmail、Calendar、Sheets、Docs、Chat、Admin 等全套 Google Workspace API 的访问。

gws 的核心设计是动态命令生成——运行时从 Google Discovery Service 读取 API 定义并自动构建命令树，无需手动更新即可支持新端点。工具内置 MCP Server（通过 `gws mcp -s drive,gmail,calendar` 启动），可直接被 Claude Desktop、Gemini CLI、VS Code 等 MCP 兼容客户端调用。

项目发布 6 天已获 15,300+ Stars 和 561 Forks，曾登顶 Hacker News。需要注意的是，仓库明确标注「This is not an officially supported Google product」，当前版本为 v0.4.x，尚未达到 1.0 稳定版。
zh.whyItMatters:
此前，让 AI Agent 操作 Google Workspace 需要开发者逐一对接各服务 API、处理 OAuth 流程、编写适配层。gws 将这些工作压缩为一条 npm/cargo 安装命令 + 一行 MCP 配置。

对于正在构建 AI Agent 的开发者，这意味着可以在几分钟内让 Agent 具备读写邮件、管理日历、操作文档等企业级能力，而不是花数天编写集成代码。100+ 预置 Agent Skills 覆盖了常见工作流（如转发邮件附件、追加 Sheets 数据、创建日历事件），降低了 Agent 开发的入门门槛。

从行业角度看，Google 以 MCP 协议而非私有接口发布此工具，表明 MCP 正在成为 AI Agent 与企业服务交互的事实标准。微软有 Copilot Tasks，OpenAI 收购了 OpenClaw 架构师——企业 AI Agent 基础设施的竞争正在加速。

groups.name: AI Agent 开发者
groups.description: 直接受益：无需自建 Google Workspace 集成层，通过 MCP 协议即可让 Agent 操作企业办公数据，开发周期从数天缩短到数小时

groups.name: 个人开发者 / 独立开发者
groups.description: 可在个人项目中用 Claude Desktop 或其他 MCP 客户端直接管理自己的 Gmail、Drive、Calendar，实现邮件自动分类、日程智能安排等个人效率自动化

groups.name: 企业 IT 团队
groups.description: 需要评估安全合规性：gws 非 Google 官方支持产品，--sanitize 依赖 Google Cloud Model Armor，企业部署前需审慎评估数据安全风险

groups.name: 第三方 Workspace MCP 方案开发者
groups.description: 面临竞争压力：Google 官方仓库的 MCP 实现覆盖面更广、更新更快，社区方案需找到差异化定位

immediate: 运行 `npm install -g @googleworkspace/cli` 安装 gws，执行 `gws drive files list` 验证是否能正常访问你的 Workspace 数据
在 Claude Desktop 或 VS Code 中配置 gws MCP Server（`gws mcp -s drive,gmail,calendar`），测试 Agent 能否读取邮件和日历
thisWeek: 浏览 [skills 目录](https://github.com/googleworkspace/cli/blob/main/docs/skills.md) 中的 100+ 预置技能，找到与你当前 Agent 项目最相关的 3-5 个 skill 进行集成测试
如果你有现成的 Workspace API 集成代码，评估是否值得迁移到 gws：对比维护成本、功能覆盖度和 MCP 兼容性
watchAndWait: 关注 gws 仓库的 v1.0 路线图和 breaking changes——当前 v0.4.x 阶段 API 可能频繁变动，生产环境部署需谨慎
跟踪 Google 是否会将 gws 升级为官方支持产品（目前标注为非官方），这将直接影响企业采纳决策

options.name: 立即集成 gws MCP
options.suitableFor: 正在开发 AI Agent 且需要 Workspace 数据访问的团队
options.risk: v0.4.x 阶段 API 不稳定，非官方支持产品，生产环境存在维护风险
options.description: 将 gws 作为 MCP Server 接入你的 AI Agent 开发环境，获得全套 Workspace API 访问能力。

options.name: 使用社区 MCP 方案
options.suitableFor: 只需要 Gmail/Calendar 等单一服务的轻量级场景
options.risk: 功能覆盖有限，社区维护不确定性高
options.description: 采用 GitHub 上已有的单服务 MCP 适配器，按需选择 Gmail 或 Calendar 等模块。

options.name: 自建 Workspace API 集成
options.suitableFor: 有严格安全合规要求的企业
options.risk: 开发成本高，需跟踪多个 API 版本变化
options.description: 通过 Google OAuth 和 REST API 自行构建集成层，完全掌控安全和数据流。

options.name: 保持现状
options.suitableFor: 当前 Agent 不需要 Workspace 数据访问的团队
options.risk: 如果竞品 Agent 率先集成 Workspace 能力，可能在企业场景中失去竞争力
options.description: 当前不做任何集成变更，持续关注 gws 生态发展和稳定性。

risks.title: 误将 gws 当作 Google 官方支持产品部署到生产环境
risks.description: 仓库明确标注「not an officially supported Google product」，不提供生产级稳定性、安全性和维护承诺。企业部署前务必做安全审计，不要仅因为在 googleworkspace 组织下就默认为官方产品。

risks.title: 忽视 Agent 操作 Workspace 的安全风险
risks.description: AI Agent 获得 Gmail/Drive 读写权限后，prompt injection 攻击可能导致数据泄露。Cisco 研究已指出类似风险。务必启用 --sanitize 标志并限制 Agent 的权限范围，避免授予过宽的 OAuth scope。

risks.title: 过早放弃现有集成方案全面迁移
risks.description: gws 仍处于 v0.4.x 阶段，API 可能发生 breaking changes。不建议立即在生产环境中替换已验证的集成方案，应在开发/测试环境中先行验证。

sources.title: The Next Web: Google made Gmail and Drive easier for AI agents to use
sources.excerpt: 报道了 gws 获得 14,000+ Stars 的社区反响，指出 Google 在文档中提及 OpenClaw 集成的战略意义，以及 Cisco 研究发现的 Agent 安全风险。强调企业 AI Agent 基础设施竞争正在加速。

sources.title: WinBuzzer: New Google Workspace CLI Offers Built-In MCP Server for AI Agents

sources.title: MarkTechPost: Google AI Releases a CLI Tool (gws) for Workspace APIs
sources.excerpt: 技术角度解析了 gws 的动态 API 发现机制——运行时从 Discovery Service 获取 API 定义并自动构建命令树，以及 JSON 结构化输出对 AI Agent 的友好性。

en.title: AI Agents Now Access Google Workspace Natively
en.subtitle: Developers can now connect Claude, Gemini, or any MCP client to Gmail, Drive, and Calendar in minutes
en.tldr: Google open-sourced gws, a Rust-based CLI with a native MCP server that gives AI agents read/write access to the full Google Workspace suite — 15K+ GitHub stars in 6 days.

rows.note: Model Armor scans API responses for prompt injection; requires Google Cloud

keyMetrics.footnote: gws dynamically generates commands from Google Discovery Service — new API endpoints work without tool updates
keyMetrics.subject: gws CLI

en.whatHappened:
On March 2, 2026, Google published [googleworkspace/cli](https://github.com/googleworkspace/cli) (aka gws) — a Rust-based open-source CLI that provides unified access to Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, Admin, and other Google Workspace APIs through a single command-line tool.

The standout feature is dynamic command generation: gws reads Google's Discovery Service at runtime to build its entire command tree, automatically supporting new API endpoints without manual updates. It ships with a built-in MCP server (`gws mcp -s drive,gmail,calendar`) that works with Claude Desktop, Gemini CLI, VS Code, and any MCP-compatible client.

The project hit 15,300+ stars and 561 forks in 6 days, reaching #1 on Hacker News. The repository explicitly states: "This is not an officially supported Google product." Current version is v0.4.x, pre-1.0 with expected breaking changes.
en.whyItMatters:
Before gws, connecting an AI agent to Google Workspace meant dealing with separate APIs, distinct OAuth flows, and custom adapter code for each service. gws collapses this into a single install command plus one MCP configuration line.

For developers building AI agents, this means adding enterprise-grade capabilities — reading emails, managing calendars, manipulating spreadsheets — in minutes rather than days. The 100+ pre-built agent skills cover common workflows out of the box.

Strategically, Google choosing to ship this as an MCP server (rather than a proprietary interface) validates MCP as the emerging standard for agent-to-service communication. With Microsoft pushing Copilot Tasks and OpenAI acquiring OpenClaw's architect, the race for enterprise AI agent infrastructure is intensifying.

groups.name: AI Agent Developers
groups.description: Direct benefit: skip building custom Workspace integrations. MCP protocol lets agents access enterprise productivity data with minimal setup, cutting integration time from days to hours.

groups.name: Solo Developers / Indie Hackers
groups.description: Use Claude Desktop or other MCP clients to manage personal Gmail, Drive, and Calendar — automate email triage, smart scheduling, and file organization without writing integration code.

groups.name: Enterprise IT Teams
groups.description: Must evaluate security posture: gws is not an officially supported Google product. The --sanitize flag depends on Google Cloud Model Armor. Production deployment requires careful security review.

groups.name: Third-party Workspace MCP Authors
groups.description: Competitive pressure from Google's own MCP implementation with broader service coverage and faster updates. Community solutions need to find differentiated positioning.

immediate: Install gws (`npm install -g @googleworkspace/cli`) and run `gws drive files list` to verify access to your Workspace data
Configure gws MCP server in Claude Desktop or VS Code (`gws mcp -s drive,gmail,calendar`) and test agent-driven email and calendar operations
thisWeek: Review the [skills directory](https://github.com/googleworkspace/cli/blob/main/docs/skills.md) — identify 3-5 pre-built skills relevant to your current agent project and run integration tests
If you maintain existing Workspace API integrations, benchmark gws against your current solution for maintenance cost, feature coverage, and MCP compatibility
watchAndWait: Track gws v1.0 roadmap and breaking changes — the v0.4.x API surface is still unstable, so hold off on production deployments until the interface stabilizes
Monitor whether Google elevates gws to officially supported product status — this would be a key signal for enterprise adoption

options.name: Integrate gws MCP now
options.suitableFor: Teams actively building AI agents that need Workspace data access
options.risk: v0.4.x API instability; not officially supported; maintenance risk in production
options.description: Add gws as an MCP server to your AI agent development stack for full Workspace API access.

options.name: Use community MCP solutions
options.suitableFor: Lightweight use cases needing only Gmail or Calendar
options.risk: Limited feature coverage; uncertain community maintenance
options.description: Use existing single-service MCP adapters from GitHub for Gmail, Calendar, or other individual services.

options.name: Build custom Workspace API integration
options.suitableFor: Enterprises with strict security and compliance requirements
options.risk: High development cost; must track multiple API version changes
options.description: Build your own integration layer via Google OAuth and REST APIs with full control over security and data flow.

options.name: Do nothing
options.suitableFor: Teams whose agents don't need Workspace data access
options.risk: If competitors ship Workspace-connected agents first, you may lose ground in enterprise scenarios
options.description: Make no integration changes now. Monitor gws ecosystem maturity and stability over time.

risks.title: Treating gws as an officially supported Google product
risks.description: The repository explicitly states it is 'not an officially supported Google product' — no production-grade stability, security, or maintenance guarantees. Being hosted under the googleworkspace GitHub org does not equal official support. Run a security audit before any production deployment.

risks.title: Underestimating agent security risks with Workspace access
risks.description: Granting AI agents read/write access to Gmail and Drive opens prompt injection attack surfaces that could lead to data exfiltration. Cisco research has flagged similar vulnerabilities. Always enable the --sanitize flag and restrict OAuth scopes to minimum required permissions.

risks.title: Migrating production integrations too early
risks.description: gws is at v0.4.x with expected breaking changes before v1.0. Replacing battle-tested integrations prematurely could introduce instability. Validate in dev/staging environments first.

sources.title: GitHub: googleworkspace/cli
sources.excerpt: Open-source repo under Apache-2.0, written in Rust. 15,300+ stars / 561 forks. Supports Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, Admin with built-in MCP server and 100+ agent skills. Explicitly marked as not officially supported.

sources.excerpt: Detailed coverage of gws dynamic command architecture, MCP server integration, 100+ agent skills, and competitive landscape analysis with Microsoft Copilot Tasks and OpenAI/OpenClaw.

sources.title: The Next Web: Google made Gmail and Drive easier for AI agents to use
sources.excerpt: Covered 14K+ stars community reception, strategic significance of Google referencing OpenClaw in documentation, and Cisco research on agent security vulnerabilities. Noted enterprise AI infrastructure competition is accelerating.

sources.title: WinBuzzer: New Google Workspace CLI Offers Built-In MCP Server for AI Agents
sources.excerpt: Covered MCP server functionality, Model Armor security features, and positioning within Google's AI agent ecosystem.

sources.title: MarkTechPost: Google AI Releases a CLI Tool (gws) for Workspace APIs
sources.excerpt: Technical breakdown of gws dynamic API discovery mechanism — runtime Discovery Service fetching, automatic command tree generation, and structured JSON output for AI agent compatibility.
